text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, at Tazuna's request, I deliver some
handouts to Agnes Tachyon on the way back to
my office.
choice_data_list: So this is her lab, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...
Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Tachyon! Tachyon! Wake up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Do you need Tachyon for something too?
That's too bad. Take a look at her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh-heh! Hey now, don't fight... All students are my guinea pigs, so just line up and play nice... Heh-heh. Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... And after I came all the way over here to
play with her. This is so boring!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hold on. What's this? She left her computer
on...
choice_data_list: It's some kind of... report, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! This is a recipe for medicine. Whoa...
It's supposed to help bones heal!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that's what it says. You just have to read
it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is actually pretty neat! It reminds me of
a magic potion I saw in a grimoire once.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's make the medicine while she's
sleeping! ♪ That'll be a great way to kill time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, why not?! It's her fault for being asleep! If
she doesn't want me to use her stuff, she should
just wake up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little concerned, I decide to stay and keep an
eye on her while Sweep Tosho quickly mixes up
the medicine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
La di da! La la laaa! ♪ Now I just turn up the heat,
and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're so annoying, Familiar. The recipe said this
would happen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If anything, it's a sign of success! See, the color is
changing! ♪ Now it just needs to boil for ten
more minutes and it'll be ready!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Nnng... What's that smell?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally up. I can't believe how lazy you
are!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Is this... Did you make this without asking?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And it's already done, so there's no
point in whining now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh-heh... No, it's fine. I don't mind at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In fact, I'm rather impressed! It's splendid!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The recipe for this medicine is perfect, but it is
quite difficult to follow.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The necessary temperatures and such are quite
delicate, and... Well, simply put, it's difficult to
produce in large quantities!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You've really helped me out. After working on it
for three days and three nights, I've been quite
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So that's why you were sleeping? Man, you must
really love science.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But is it really all that delicate? I thought it was
suuuper easy.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you did it right?
Are you sure you did it right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But is it really all that delicate? I thought it was
suuuper easy.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you did it right?
Are you sure you did it right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You really are. I knew you were skilled, but I
wouldn't have guessed you would finish it so
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact, would you mind helping me
make more? I would be delighted to borrow your
powerful magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
My magic is really powerful, huh?! Hehe. Well, I
suppooose I can help!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But let's talk about payment. I want some of the
medicine, plus the usual tea and snacks! The
sweet ones!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You have yourself a deal! All right, shall we get
started?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What's with you?! Are you doubting my magic? Of
course I did it right! That's a given!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! If you don't believe me, I'll prove it by
having you test it first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's a great idea! Right, down the hatch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Waaait! Don't think you're getting out of
this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: AHAHAHA!
